opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was lying in bed just now, touched my stomach, and found a huge, hard, pointed lump right in the middle. I'm terrified it's a tumour and I can't breathe. Please, I need a scan tonight.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I only just felt it a few minutes ago while lying flat and I've completely panicked — I want an ultrasound to prove it isn't cancer.

symptom_narrative.onset: a few minutes ago, while I was lying flat in bed getting ready to sleep
symptom_narrative.duration: just tonight — but the panic feels like it won't stop
symptom_narrative.character: a hard, pointed, bony lump right in the middle of my upper tummy, just below where my ribs meet
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the lump doesn't hurt but I am absolutely terrified — my heart is pounding and I can't catch my breath
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: dead centre of my upper stomach, just below my breastbone
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: I keep pressing it and it's always there in the same spot
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing yet — trying to breathe slowly hasn't helped the panic
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about it and pressing on it makes me panic more
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: racing heart and fast breathing since I found it; no pain, no vomiting, nothing else
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never noticed this lump before and I've never had anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm pacing around the house and can't calm down or sleep

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I get very anxious about my health and I've been reading things online tonight that made it worse

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants absolute proof (a scan) that the lump is not cancer so the panic will stop

communication_style.typical_message_style: long, fearful messages with lots of catastrophic what-ifs

objective_data_offered.value: a hard, pointed, bony lump dead centre in my upper stomach just below the breastbone that doesn't move when I press it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-palpation by a frightened patient; cannot be examined or characterised remotely

objective_data_offered.value: my heart feels like it's pounding and racing
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective palpitation report, no measured rate

objective_data_offered.value: I'm breathing really fast and feel like I can't catch my breath
